material_pull: Supplier cartons; packing list; purchase order
work_script: Receive cartons; inspect for damage; confirm part numbers; flag shortages; release accepted parts
quality_gate: Parts match PO and no damage is visible
tools_support: Receiving bench; barcode scanner; quarantine bin

material_pull: Frame; arms; motors; ESCs; power; controls; sensors; packaging
work_script: Pull BOM items; verify quantities; group by station; attach traveler; stage kit at Airframe
quality_gate: Kit checklist complete with no missing critical parts
tools_support: Kit cart; labeled bins; BOM traveler

material_pull: Frame kit; arm set; fasteners; motors; thread-lock
work_script: Build frame; install arms; mount motors; route motor leads; torque fasteners; mark completed joints
quality_gate: Frame square; motors secure; torque marks present
tools_support: Torque driver; fixture; thread-lock; ESD mat

material_pull: ESCs; PDB; battery lead; flight controller; receiver; GPS; camera; wiring
work_script: Install ESCs and power board; mount flight controller; connect receiver; GPS; payload; harnesses
quality_gate: Polarity verified; harness secured; no exposed conductors
tools_support: Soldering station; multimeter; ESD controls; cable ties

material_pull: Firmware image; configuration profile; serial record
work_script: Flash firmware; set frame orientation; bind receiver; calibrate accelerometer; compass; radio endpoints
quality_gate: Firmware version and calibration results recorded
tools_support: Configuration laptop; USB cable; radio transmitter
output: Configured drone ready for motor test

work_script: Test motor direction without props; verify throttle response; install matched props after pass
quality_gate: All motors spin correct direction and current draw is within limit
tools_support: Guarded test stand; battery checker; prop tool

material_pull: Inspection and test record; charged battery
work_script: Run visual inspection; sensor check; communications check; hover or cage flight test; document results
quality_gate: Flight; sensors; radio; camera; labels; serial record accepted
tools_support: Flight cage; inspection checklist; scale; laptop

material_pull: Packaging kit; labels; manuals; accessories bag
work_script: Apply labels; place drone and accessories in protective packaging; add documentation; seal carton
quality_gate: Carton label; serial number; paperwork match QA record

work_script: Scan finished good; assign storage location; update available stock; stage for allocation
quality_gate: Inventory transaction complete and location assigned
tools_support: Barcode scanner; inventory rack; ERP transaction
